title: [Bug]: Quadlet generating services with wrong podman path
body:
### Issue Description

Quadlet is generating systemd service files with the wrong podman path. It is filling out the ExecStart and ExecStopPost options with /usr/local/bin/podman, when it should be /usr/bin/podman. The output of `podman generate systemd` is using the correct podman path, so I don't think this is an Arch Linux packaging issue

Container file:
```
[Unit]
Description=Forgejo container

[Container]
Image=codeberg.org/forgejo/forgejo:latest
ContainerName=forgejo
Network=services
PublishPort=3000
Volume=forgejo_data:/data

[Service]
Restart=always

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
```
Generated systemd service:
```
# Automatically generated by /usr/lib/systemd/system-generators/podman-system-generator
#
[Unit]
Description=Forgejo container
SourcePath=/etc/containers/systemd/forgejo.container
RequiresMountsFor=%t/containers

[X-Container]
Image=codeberg.org/forgejo/forgejo:latest
ContainerName=forgejo
Network=services
PublishPort=3000
Volume=forgejo_data:/data

[Service]
Restart=always
Environment=PODMAN_SYSTEMD_UNIT=%n
KillMode=mixed
ExecStopPost=-/usr/local/bin/podman rm -f -i --cidfile=%t/%N.cid
ExecStopPost=-rm -f %t/%N.cid
Delegate=yes
Type=notify
NotifyAccess=all
SyslogIdentifier=%N
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/podman run --name=forgejo --cidfile=%t/%N.cid --replace --rm --log-driver passthrough --runtime /usr/bin/crun --cgroups=split --network=services --sdnotify=conmon -d -v forgejo_data:/data --publish 3000 codeberg.org/forgejo/forgejo:latest

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create .container file in /etc/containers/systemd
2. Systemctl daemon-reload
3. Try and start the generated systemd service


### Describe the results you received

Systemd service immediately fails with the following error output
```
systemd[1]: Starting Forgejo container...
systemd[1]: forgejo.service: Main process exited, code=exited, status=203/EXEC
systemd[1421]: forgejo.service: Executable /usr/local/bin/podman missing, skipping: No such file or directory
systemd[1]: forgejo.service: Failed with result 'exit-code'.
systemd[1]: Failed to start Forgejo container.
```

### Describe the results you expected

To at least run podman when starting the generated service

### podman info output


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Privileged

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

OS: Arch Linux

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body:
It's actually a  Arch Linux packaging issue, and fixed in this commit https://github.com/archlinux/svntogit-community/commit/0a32bd84ea64ba107e3969e94577d5152b969cf3

related archlinux bug report https://bugs.archlinux.org/task/77364
